Caloric restriction (CR)5 and total caloric desistance [TCD; i.e., intermittent fasting, alternate-day fasting (ADF), routine periodic fasti... [REF:2].

The idea is that it's easier to sharply restrict calories a few days a week or to limit eating to a shortened "eating window" each day than ... [REF:1].

With this approach, eating is limited to about an 8 to 10 hour window of time each day. [REF:3].

**Key Findings**

- Caloric restriction (CR)5 and total caloric desistance [TCD; i.e., intermittent fasting, alternate-day fasting (ADF), routine periodic fasti... [REF:2]
- The idea is that it's easier to sharply restrict calories a few days a week or to limit eating to a shortened "eating window" each day than ... [REF:1]
- With this approach, eating is limited to about an 8 to 10 hour window of time each day. [REF:3]
